title: ceropegia olivacea
intro: Ceropegia olivacea, also known as the Olive-stemmed Milk-pair, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ceropegia olivacea include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
